title: erigeron religiosus
intro: Erigeron religiosus, also known as the Santa Maria or Beach Fleabane, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Erigeron religiosus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
